generated_for.experience_summary: Operations professional building an integrated data analytics portfolio with spreadsheet, SQL, Python, Power BI, and stakeholder communication evidence.

projects.title: Healthcare Operations Intelligence
projects.summary: Complete an end-to-end business analysis using spreadsheets, SQL, Python, Power BI, and reproducible documentation.
projects.business_problem: Operational leaders need a validated, reproducible analysis that converts messy source data into trustworthy measures, a decision-focused dashboard, and practical recommendations.
projects.portfolio_story: Demonstrates an integrated analyst workflow from business framing and source inspection through SQL, Python, Power BI, recommendations, and reproducible delivery.

milestones.label: Inspect source data
milestones.description: Inspect source files in a spreadsheet and document grain, fields, missingness, and business assumptions.
milestones.definition_of_done: A source-inspection log documents every table and issue.

milestones.label: Validate and model with SQL
milestones.description: Write DuckDB SQL to validate keys, relationships, ranges, and create an analysis-ready relational model.
milestones.definition_of_done: Saved SQL validates every key and produces documented analysis tables.

milestones.label: Prepare and analyze with Python
milestones.description: Use Python and pandas for reproducible cleaning, exploratory analysis, and checks that complement the SQL workflow.
milestones.definition_of_done: A reproducible Python script creates documented outputs without completing conclusions for the learner.

milestones.label: Build the Power BI solution
milestones.description: Use Power Query, a relational model, DAX measures, and accessible report pages to answer stakeholder decisions.
milestones.definition_of_done: A documented Power BI model and dashboard answer the approved questions with tested measures.

milestones.label: Communicate recommendations
milestones.description: Translate findings into decision-focused recommendations, limitations, and implementation considerations.
milestones.definition_of_done: A stakeholder brief separates evidence, assumptions, recommendations, and limitations.

milestones.label: Publish reproducibly
milestones.description: Finalize GitHub documentation, environment instructions, validation evidence, and a concise presentation.
milestones.definition_of_done: A reviewer can reproduce the workflow and identify the learner's own work.

datasets.name: Healthcare Operations Intelligence Dataset
datasets.description: Synthetic operational records with intentional quality issues for realistic validation and analysis.
datasets.generation_notes: Include missing values, duplicate rows, and one orphaned foreign key.

kpis.name: Operational performance rate
kpis.definition: Validated completed events divided by eligible events at the selected reporting grain.
kpis.decision_use: Compare performance and prioritize operational review.

files.content: -- Write validation and analysis SQL here.
# Write reproducible pandas preparation and analysis here.

# Power BI Build Guide

Document Power Query steps, relationships, DAX measures, report pages, and validation.
